CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2023 Off Calendar

Amended Motion For Order Determining Good Faith Settlement; Declaration Of Heather M. Mckeon
Off Calendar Aug-09-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANTS' AMENDED MOTION FOR ORDER DETERMINING GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT is GRANTED. Tech-Built factors met. No opposition filed.

Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-17-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-05-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, ETC.
Off Calendar Jul-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS ROBERT MORRIS AND JODI MORRIS'S MOTION FOR ORDER DETERMINING GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT.

Appearances: Daniel Wolfberg of Tharpe & Howell, LLP (818.205.9955) appearing via Zoom for defendants and moving parties; No other appearances.

The Court clarifies why it issued the following tentative ruling: Hearing required. No later than 9:00 a.m. on July 13, 2023 moving party to file: (1) an amended proof of service compliant with CRC 2.251 and CCP 1013b(b); (2) a declaration re: Tsering Denma express consent to electronic service. Courtesy copies to be delivered to department 501 by 9:00 a.m. on July 13, 2023.

Counsel confirms there is no agreement to serve Tsering Denma via electronic service. The Court takes the motion off calendar. Counsel may re-file the motion and request a continuance of the trial date, which is currently scheduled for July 17, 2023. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/HEK)

MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, ETC.
Off Calendar Jul-06-2023 Continued To Jul-13-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

RE: DEFENDANTS ROBERT MORRIS, JR. and JODI MORRIS' MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, ETC.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. The motion is transferred to be heard in Department 501 at 9:30 a.m on Thursday, July 13, 2023. That department handles all law and motion matters for cases arising out of trespass per Local Rule 8.10. The moving party is ordered to provide courtesy copies to Department 501 no later than 4 p.m. on Monday, July 10.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
